title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.190 - Plaintiff may relinquish land and recover value, less the improvements
text:
524.190.  Plaintiff may relinquish land and recover value, less the improvements. — The plaintiff may in his answer ask for leave to relinquish the land to the occupying claimant, and to recover the value thereof, aside from the improvements.
(RSMo 1939 § 1551) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1387; 1919 § 1837; 1909 § 2404
